description:
Perform spatial territory analysis on a simulated cell monolayer using the images cell_bodies.tif and cell_nuclei.tif located in ~/Fiji_Data/raw/voronoi_task/. Segment individual cell territories using Voronoi tessellation seeded by nuclear centroids. For each cell territory (excluding edge-touching cells), measure the Area, Perimeter, Circularity, Solidity, Centroid (X,Y), and the number of neighbors. 

Save the following results to ~/Fiji_Data/results/voronoi/:
- territory_measurements.csv: A CSV file with columns: cell_id, centroid_x, centroid_y, area_px, perimeter_px, circularity, solidity, neighbors.
- voronoi_overlay.png: An image showing the Voronoi boundaries overlaid on the original cell_bodies.tif image.
- spatial_summary.txt: A text file summarizing the analysis with: total_cells_detected, mean_area_px, mean_circularity, mean_neighbors.
